title: Public capture index row
description: One row of data/archive_public/captures.csv — the ONLY archive data committed to this public repository. It is sanitized metadata about a capture, never the capture itself. Raw material (WACZ/WARC, HTML, headers, cookies, storage values, screenshots, SingleFile output) lives exclusively on the external corpus volume.

domain.description: Observed host. Already public in the monitor inventories.

storage_mode.description: The storage mode only. The archive root path is never published: it would disclose the operator's username.

source_final_url.description: Query string is stripped: gateway redirects routinely carry invite and referral parameters.

corpus_relpath.description: Identifier relative to $ARCHIVE_ROOT. MUST NOT be an absolute path and MUST NOT traverse upward.

$comment: Fields explicitly forbidden here: WACZ/WARC bytes, HTML or response bodies, full headers, cookies or Set-Cookie, browser storage values, Authorization values, API keys or tokens, raw redirect query parameters, personal filesystem paths, SingleFile HTML, screenshots, unsanitized Browsertrix logs. additionalProperties is false so a new field cannot appear by accident.
